Application Insights View Requirements Education Additional Requirements Only Male শুধুমাত্র পুরুষ। অফিস পরিষ্কার-পরিচ্ছন্নতা ও সাধারণ অফিস সহায়ক কাজে অভিজ্ঞতা। শারীরিকভাবে সুস্থ ও পরিশ্রমী হতে হবে। সততা, দায়িত্বশীলতা ও সময়ানুবর্তিতা থাকতে হবে। Responsibilities & Context দায়িত্ব ও কর্তব্য: প্রতিদিন অফিস কক্ষ, টয়লেট, জানালা-দরজা ও আশপাশের এলাকা পরিষ্কার করা। অফিসের গ্লাস, টেবিল এবং অন্যান্য সরঞ্জাম ধুয়ে-মুছে পরিষ্কার রাখা। অফিস ফাইল ও ডকুমেন্ট সুশৃঙ্খলভাবে সংরক্ষণ করা। অফিসের প্রয়োজনে ব্যাংকে যাওয়া, বিল পরিশোধ করা বা অফিস ফাইল/ডকুমেন্ট/চিঠি নিয়ে বিভিন্ন দপ্তরে যাওয়া। চা/নাস্তা পরিবেশন ও প্রয়োজনীয় সহায়তা প্রদান। প্রতিদিন অফিস খোলা এবং বন্ধ করা। অফিসের অন্যান্য সহায়ক কাজ সম্পাদন। Employment Status Full Time Gender Only males are allowed to apply. Sewing Incharge : MAKALOT BANGLADESH LTD. Jobs ENG বাংলা Create Account Sign In For Employer Create Sign In Home Jobs Mybdjobs Job List MAKALOT BANGLADESH LTD. Sewing Incharge Application Deadline : 01 Apr 2026 Apply Now Shortlist Share: Facebook LinkedIn WhatsApp All Requirements Responsibilities Salary & Benefits Company Information Summary Vacancy: 02 Age: 30 to 45 years Location: Gazipur Salary: Negotiable Published: 02 Mar 2026 Application Insights View Requirements Education Experience Additional Requirements Age 30 to 45 years Only Male Responsibilities & Context Production Management: Plan, schedule, and execute production targets while ensuring the smooth flow of goods from input to finishing. Production Planning & Execution: Collaborate with the Planning Department to schedule daily production targets and ensure the floor meets deadlines. Line Balancing: Analyze the garment construction style to calculate machine requirements and allocate operators based on their skills to minimize bottlenecks. Workflow & Efficiency: Assign tasks to operators based on skill, manage the sewing line layout, and optimize production methods to reduce downtime. Quality Control: Monitor the inline quality, ensuring garments meet buyer specifications, and promptly address, correct, or analyze the root cause of high-rate defects. Oversee the daily operations of the sewing lines to ensure products meet company and buyer quality standards . Resource Management: Ensure that all input materials—such as cut panels from the fabric store, thread from the warehouse, and needles—are available to maintain an uninterrupted workflow. Team Supervision: Train and mentor the sewing production team , including operators and helpers, while conducting performance evaluations and managing discipline (attendance, lateness, etc.). Machine & Floor Maintenance: Ensure all sewing machines are in working order, coordinate with maintenance for repairs, and keep the production floor clean and organized. Technical Oversight: Work with the maintenance team to ensure all industrial sewing machines are in optimal working condition and implement SOPs for machine lubrication and cleaning. Problem Solving: Identify and resolve issues related to machinery, manpower, or quality immediately to prevent large-scale production defects. Reporting & Documentation: Maintain detailed records of production efficiency and prepare regular reports for senior management regarding output and target achievement. Compensation & Other Benefits Salary Review: Yearly Lunch Facilities: Full Subsidize Festival Bonus: 2 Earned Leave Encashment Attendance Bonus Workplace Work at office Employment Status Full Time Gender Only males are allowed to apply. Job Location Gazipur Company Information MAKALOT BANGLADESH LTD. Application Insights View Requirements Education Experience Additional Requirements Minimum Required: Experience: Minimum 3–4 years of experience in monitoring, evaluation, accountability, research, or project management (experience in gender equality, WROs, human rights, or community-based programs preferred). Demonstrated experience in data collection (qualitative and/or quantitative) at community level. Familiarity with participatory and inclusive monitoring approaches; willingness to learn feminist MEAL methodologies. Experience using digital data collection tools (KoboToolbox, ODK, Google Forms, etc.) or strong willingness to learn. Basic data analysis skills (Excel or similar tools) and experienced to develop donor reports preferably in English. job_description: Planning, Monitoring, Evaluation and Reporting (PMER) Officer : The Bangladesh Red Crescent Society Jobs ENG বাংলা Create Account Sign In For Employer Create Sign In Home Jobs Mybdjobs Job List The Bangladesh Red Crescent Society Planning, Monitoring, Evaluation and Reporting (PMER) Officer Application Deadline : 08 Mar 2026 Apply Now Shortlist Share: Facebook LinkedIn WhatsApp All Requirements Responsibilities Company Information Summary Vacancy: 1 Location: Dhaka Salary: Tk. 60000 (Monthly) Published: 02 Mar 2026 Application Insights View Requirements Education Experience Additional Requirements Experience Minimum 3–5 years of relevant experience in PMER/MEAL within health, humanitarian, or development programs. Proven experience in monitoring health programs, data analysis, and donor reporting. Experience working with Red Cross/Red Crescent Movement or NGOs is an asset. Required Competencies and Skills Strong analytical and report-writing skills. Proven ability to design indicators, tools, and monitoring frameworks. Proficiency in MS Office (Excel, Word, PowerPoint); knowledge of data visualization tools is an advantage. Ability to work independently and collaboratively in a multi-disciplinary team. Strong communication, coordination, and facilitation skills. Willingness to travel to field locations as required. Core Values and Principles Commitment to the Fundamental Principles of the Red Cross and Red Crescent Movement. Strong sense of integrity, accountability, and professionalism. Respect for diversity and cultural sensitivity. Age Limit: 45 years maximum (Age limit will be relaxed in case of potential candidates) Responsibilities & Context The Red Cross-Red Crescent Movement is the largest volunteer organization in the world. Bangladesh Red   Crescent Society (BDRCS), a national society of the Movement, constituted on 31 March 1973 by the President`s Order No. 26 of 1973 with retrospective effect from 16 December 1971, is the biggest humanitarian organization in the country. As an auxiliary to the government in terms of providing the humanitarian assistance, BDRCS has been working to prevent and alleviate human suffering through rendering humanitarian services in partnership with local authorities and communities across all the districts of Bangladesh through its 68 branches and dedicated network of volunteers, in line with the international humanitarian standards and adhering to the seven Fundamental Principles of the Red Cross Red Crescent Movement. BDRCS activities include Humanitarian Response, Climate Change Adaptation, Disaster Management, Health and Wellbeing, Capacity Building and Promoting Red Cross/ Red Crescent ideals and principles. Currently BDRCS is looking for a suitable Bangladeshi candidate for the following position: Project Name: Various projects under Health Department Job Nature: Contractual Duration of Contract: 1 year (with possibility of extension subject to satisfactory performance and availability of fund) Report

Officer / Senior Officer - VAT : Advanced Chemical Industries PLC (ACI) Jobs ENG বাংলা Create Account Sign In For Employer Create Sign In Home Jobs Mybdjobs Job List Advanced Chemical Industries PLC (ACI) Officer / Senior Officer - VAT Application Deadline : 27 Mar 2026 Apply Now Shortlist Share: Facebook LinkedIn WhatsApp All Requirements Responsibilities Skills & Expertise Company Information Summary Vacancy: -- Location: Chattogram (Mirsharai) Published: 02 Mar 2026 Applicants are encouraged to submit Video CV. Application Insights View Requirements Education Experience Additional Requirements Professional VAT certification is a plus Responsibilities & Context 1. VAT Operations and Monitoring Ensure smooth daily maintenance of all VAT-related records including: Mushak 6.3: Tax Invoices for sales. Mushak 6.6: VDS (VAT Deducted at Source) Certificates. Mushak 9.1: Monthly VAT Returns. Mushak 6.1 & 6.2: Purchase and Sales Account Books. Track performance metrics such as Input-Output Coefficients to ensure tax efficiency and compliance with declared ratios. 2. Compliance & Reconciliation Plan and execute monthly reconciliation between VAT Registers and the General Ledger (Books of Accounts) . Respond promptly to discrepancies in tax credits or treasury deposits to prevent legal "downtime." Maintain accurate "Challan" logs and ensure all treasury deposits are mapped to the correct economic codes. 3. Audit & Regulatory Safety Ensure all financial transactions comply with the current Finance Act and Government SROs . Conduct regular internal "health checks" (audits) of invoices and procurement files to resolve non-conformities before official inspections. Manage and represent the company during official VAT audits and field visits by NBR officials. 4. Documentation and Reporting Maintain meticulous VAT operation data, including archive files for input tax rebates (Rebates). Prepare Monthly VAT Returns and reports on tax liability, exemptions, and withholding tax (VDS). Track and initiate proactive approaches to keep the Tax-to-Sales Ratio and other KPIs within the expected range. 5. VDS and Resource Management Plan initiatives for tax optimization by ensuring timely "Input Tax Credit" claims. Strict monitoring of VDS (VAT Deducted at Source) from suppliers; ensuring the company does not bear the liability of vendor non-compliance. Monitor changes in tax rates (5%, 7.5%, 10%, 15%) across different service/product categories and update the system accordingly. 6. Stakeholder & Vendor Coordination Coordinate with external stakeholders (NBR officials, VAT Consultants) for smooth processing of appeals, refunds, or ADR (Alternative Dispute Resolution). Coordinate with the Procurement team to ensure vendors provide valid VAT 6.3 invoices, which are the "critical spares" for claiming tax rebates. Skills & Expertise Income Tax and VAT VAT VAT and Tax Workplace Work at office Employment Status Full Time Job Location Chattogram (Mirsharai) Company Information Ad

Integrity and safeguarding awareness Responsibilities & Context BRAC is an international development organisation founded in Bangladesh that partners with over 100 million people living with inequality and poverty globally to create sustainable opportunities to realise potential. Working at BRAC is not like any other job. It is a platform where you can bring about real change for people who need it the most. We are not just dreaming of a better world, we are building it. Join us to find the way. BRAC Health Programme and BRAC Road Safety Programme will jointyly implement this pilot project “ Piloting the Emergency Medical Services Protocol for Road Crash Victims” in collaboration with Bangladesh Health Watch (BHW), relevant government agencies, and local actors. The project seeks to operationalize the “ Guidelines for Emergency Services for Road Crash Victims,” a nationally aligned emergency care protocol developed by BHW in collaboration with Bangladesh Medical University (BMU) and the Centre for Injury Prevention and Research, Bangladesh (CIPRB). Under this project BRAC will carry out on-site post-crash response, triage, transportation coordination and facility linkage activities, and will ensure that appropriate training is delivered to community health workers, volunteers, transport providers and health care workers. MAJOR RESPONSIBILITIES: Lead planning, coordination, and execution of the pilot implementation in line with the approved work plan and government-endorsed EMS protocol. Serve as the central operational focal point for real-time emergency response, ensuring timely coordination from crash alert to hospital handover. Coordinate with police, fire service, health facilities, and local administration to ensure preparedness, rapid response, and protocol compliance. Lead incident reviews, learning reflection including baseline and endline assessment, and contribution to interim and final reports, including protocol refinement recommendations if necessary. job_description: Manager / Deputy General Manager, Business Sales : bKash Ltd. Jobs ENG বাংলা Create Account Sign In For Employer Create Sign In Home Jobs Mybdjobs Job List bKash Ltd. Manager / Deputy General Manager, Business Sales Application Deadline : 12 Mar 2026 Apply Now Shortlist Share: Facebook LinkedIn WhatsApp All Requirements Responsibilities Skills & Expertise Company Information Summary Vacancy: 1 Location: Dhaka Salary: Negotiable Published: 02 Mar 2026 Application Insights View Requirements Education Experience Additional Requirements Academic: Bachelor’s degree in Business, Marketing, Finance, or a related field. Experience: Minimum 6-8 years of experience in sales, business development, or other commercial roles, with at least 3 years in leadership role. Proven track record of driving B2B Sales, managing large accounts, and securing strategic partnerships. Experience within the fintech, telecommunications, or financial services sectors is highly desirable. Deep understanding of mobile financial services and digital payment landscape in Bangladesh is a plus. Competencies: Excellent communication, negotiation, and interpersonal skills, with the ability to influence stakeholders at all levels. Strong business acumen with a results-driven approach for achieving growth objectives. Other Requirements: Ability to travel as needed to engage with clients and stakeholders. Fluent in Bengali and English (both written and spoken). Responsibilities & Context Job Purpose: Drive corporate client acquisition and business growth for bKash by identifying market opportunity areas, prioritizing target industries, and leading a high-performance team to deliver the business objectives. Job descriptions: Identify market opportunity and potential industries for bKash. Acquire and onboard large corporate and enterprise clients. Lead client acquisition team to sell Business Solutions of bKash. Manage, coach, and guide a team of experienced B2B sales professionals. Drive team performance through clear targets, client management, and execution. Build long term relationships with stakeholders/partners of clients. Collaborate with internal & cross functional teams to ensure seamless solution delivery. Ensure compliance with company policies, regulatory guidelines, and risk frameworks in all sales activities. Privacy Disclaimer and Consent: By submitting your application, you consent that bKash may use, process, and retain your information for recruitment purposes, including future opportunities. bKash is committed to protecting your personal information in accordance with applicable laws and regulations. Collaborative Mindset: Ability to work well with a team. Sensitivity and commitment: A commitment to work with all-inclusive populations that uphold inclusive values, respecting human rights, dignity, and social harmony. Time management: Ability to effectively manage processes, work under pressure, and meet deadlines. Responsibilities & Context Project: Renewed Women’s Voice and Leadership (RWVL) Bangladesh Reports to: Project Manager (PM) Position Level: Junior-Level Project Brief: The Renewed Women’s Voice and Leadership (RWVL) project aims to improve women's and girls' access to human rights in all their diversity and to advance gender equality in Bangladesh, led by Manusher Jonno Foundation (MJF) and funded by Global Affairs Canada (GAC). This project will focus on empowering diverse voices and strengthening collective actions to advance women’s human rights by addressing gender-based violence (GBV), sexual and reproductive health & rights (SRHR), inclusive economic empowerment (iEE), and the safety and security of project participants. As an implementing partner of MJF, Bangladesh Nari Sramik Kendra (BNSK) will carry out the project activities at the grassroots level in the Dhaka Sadar and Khulna Sadar upazilas within the Dhaka and Khulna district. This project will focus on issues categorized across various pillars. Pillar 1: Will support organizational capacity and sustainability in areas such as (i) governance improvement; (ii) financial system development; and (iii) policy articulation. Pillar 2: Will contribute to gender equality programming and advocacy at the grassroots level through (i) supporting agency creation, (ii) promoting women’s leadership, (iii) providing knowledge and skill building, to challenge social norms and practices that oppose women’s rights. Since inception, the company has been providing finance in Housing/Transportation/SME and various industrial sectors. Responsibilities & Context The Danish Refugee Council (DRC), one of the world’s leading NGOs, with a focus on responding to displacement, have been registered in Bangladesh since 2013. In 2017, in response to the Rohingya influx, DRC launched an integrated program of support to the government in site management, shelter/NFI and protection. In 2018, DRC started implementing aid projects in support of the host communities most affected by the influx of refugees. As a key part of this, DRC opened an area office in Cox’s Bazar, and a country office in Dhaka. POSITION PROFILE The Danish Refugee Council (DRC) assists Rohingya refugees and their host communities by providing humanitarian and emergency aid, supporting individuals in advocating for their rights, and strengthening opportunities for a brighter future. We work in Cox’s Bazar, along the displacement routes and in cooperation with local communities. to strive for responsible and sustainable solutions. The Area Programme Manager is the deputy of the Area Manager and will provide support to him/her on the overall management and oversight responsibility for the design, planning, implementation, monitoring and evaluation of the Rohingya refugee response programme in Cox’s Bazar. This includes ensuring quality programme performance and alignment with technical and programme management standards in the following sectors: Protection including GBV, Economic Recovery, Shelter, CCCCM and Site Development and Climate and Environment. The Area Programme Manager will ensure adequate support and capacity to the overall programmes teams to ensure the highest levels of performance, while ensuring adherence to DRC’s Project Cycle Management (PCM) standards at all programme stages. The position will line manager the Sector Programme Managers, as well as MEAL Team Leader and IM Specialist. job_description: Project Team Leader : Bangladesh Legal Aid and Services Trust (BLAST) Jobs ENG বাংলা Create Account Sign In For Employer Create Sign In Home Jobs Mybdjobs Job List Bangladesh Legal Aid and Services Trust (BLAST) Project Team Leader Application Deadline : 14 Mar 2026 Apply Now Shortlist Share: Facebook LinkedIn WhatsApp All Requirements Responsibilities Salary & Benefits Company Information Summary Vacancy: 1 Age: At least 36 years Location: Dhaka (Dhaka Sadar) Salary: Negotiable Published: 02 Mar 2026 Applicants are encouraged to submit Video CV. Application Insights View Requirements Education Experience Additional Requirements Age At least 36 years Responsibilities & Context Background Bangladesh Legal Aid and Services Trust (BLAST) is implementing the project “Supporting Media During Transition Period in Bangladesh” with the support of International Media Support (IMS). The project aims to strengthen journalist safety, freedom of expression, and access to legal protection during a critical transition period through policy advocacy, rapid legal support, capacity building, and international knowledge exchange. BLAST is seeking a competent and dynamic Team Leader to provide overall leadership and ensure effective implementation of the project activities. Major Responsibilities The Team Leader will be responsible for the overall coordination, implementation, and monitoring of the project, including but not limited to the following: 1. Project Management and Coordination Lead planning, implementation, monitoring, and reporting of all project activities. Prepare work plans, implementation schedules, and progress reports in line with project objectives. Supervise and guide project staff, consultants, trainers, and legal teams. Ensure compliance with BLAST policies, donor guidelines, and safeguarding standards. Maintain regular coordination with IMS and relevant stakeholders. 2. Policy Review and Advocacy Lead stakeholder consultations on the proposed Journalism Rights Protection Ordinance, 2025. Oversee documentation of consultation findings and preparation of recommendations. Supervise development of policy briefs/position papers and validation workshops. Coordinate advocacy engagements with the Law Ministry, Media Reform Commission, parliamentarians, and relevant authorities. 3. Rapid Legal Support for Journalists Establish and operationalise the Rapid Legal Support Monitoring Cell. Oversee development of case intake, verification, referral, and tracking mechanisms. Coordinate with BLAST legal teams to ensure timely legal support for journalists facing legal harassment. Oversee capacity building of BLAST panel lawyers on journalist safety, freedom of expression, and international standards. 4. Capacity Building of Media Practitioners Oversee development of training modules on legal safety, arrest and detention procedures, digital security, and risk mitigation. Supervise implementation of divisional-level training workshops across all eight division

job_description: Executive/Senior Executive Manager - Electrical Maintenance & Projects : Advanced Chemical Industries PLC (ACI) Jobs ENG বাংলা Create Account Sign In For Employer Create Sign In Home Jobs Mybdjobs Job List Advanced Chemical Industries PLC (ACI) Executive/Senior Executive Manager - Electrical Maintenance & Projects Application Deadline : 31 Mar 2026 Apply Now Shortlist Share: Facebook LinkedIn WhatsApp All Requirements Responsibilities Skills & Expertise Company Information Summary Vacancy: -- Location: Chattogram (Mirsharai) Published: 02 Mar 2026 Application Insights View Requirements Education Experience Additional Requirements Technical Competencies Preventive & predictive maintenance systems Electrical power distribution & industrial wiring PLC, automation & control systems (preferred) Root Cause Analysis (RCA) & troubleshooting ERP-based maintenance record management Safety compliance & electrical standards Project coordination & contractor management Behavioral Competencies Strong analytical and problem-solving skills Ability to work under pressure and meet deadlines Effective cross-functional collaboration High attention to safety and quality standards Result-oriented with a continuous improvement mindset Responsibilities & Context 1. Preventive & Corrective Maintenance Execute preventive maintenance (PM) schedules for production and supporting equipment. Respond quickly to machine breakdowns to minimize downtime. Maintain daily maintenance logs and update PM records in ERP/logbooks. 2. Equipment Reliability & Performance Monitor machine health parameters (vibration, temperature, lubrication, load) and take timely corrective action. Support production in optimizing machine speed and efficiency. Assist in root cause analysis (RCA) of recurring faults and implement corrective measures. 3. Project Support & Execution Plan and execute small-scale engineering projects. Coordinate with vendors, contractors, and suppliers for project implementation. Ensure project timelines, budgets, and safety standards are met. 4. Spare Parts & Resource Management Track spare parts inventory and initiate replenishment. Ensure proper storage, labeling, and handling of spares and tools. 5. Cross-Functional Coordination Work closely with Production, Quality, and Utility teams to schedule maintenance without disrupting output. Participate in daily operations meetings to align maintenance activities with production targets.
